caption: An older man with glasses and white hair, wearing a blue short-sleeved button-down shirt, stands behind a wooden lectern in an indoor setting. He is speaking to a small audience, consisting of several people seen from behind, including a woman with long brown hair and a person wearing a maroon shirt. The room features wood-paneled walls with vertical blinds in the background and audio equipment, including a large black speaker, to the left. On the lectern, there is a small colorful object. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. Throughout the clip, the man remains behind the lectern, gesturing slightly with his hands and shifting his facial expression as he addresses the group, while the audience members remain seated and attentive.
